mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ledger ( ledger_id, payment_instruction_id, account_id, original_ledger_id, journal_no, account_no_snap, holder_name_snap, debit_credit, journal_type, amount, currency, balance_before, balance_after, counterparty_account_no_snap, counterparty_bank_code_snap, counterparty_holder_name_snap, transaction_date, posting_date, value_date, posted_at, system_description, passbook_memo_snap, is_reversal, reversal_reason, posting_status, first_registrant_id, last_modifier_id ) VALUES ( #{ledgerId}, #{paymentInstructionId}, #{accountId}, #{originalLedgerId}, #{journalNo}, #{accountNoSnap}, #{holderNameSnap}, #{debitCredit}, #{journalType}, #{amount}, #{currency}, #{balanceBefore}, #{balanceAfter}, #{counterpartyAccountNoSnap}, #{counterpartyBankCodeSnap}, #{counterpartyHolderNameSnap}, #{transactionDate}, #{postingDate}, #{valueDate}, #{postedAt}, #{systemDescription}, #{passbookMemoSnap}, #{isReversal}, #{reversalReason}, #{postingStatus}, #{firstRegistrantId}, #{lastModifierId} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ledger WHERE payment_instruction_id = #{paymentInstructionId} ORDER BY ledger_id
SELECT * FROM ledger WHERE payment_instruction_id = #{piId} AND is_reversal = FALSE ORDER BY ledger_id
